message.content:
@startuml
title $update-core

actor "Integrating application user" as User1 at 0
participant "<color:white> Integrating\napplication </color>" as App1 #6495ED { }
database "<FHIR API>\nHPI" as FhirApi2 #6495ED { }
rectangle HpiMdm3 <<Database>> [ <color=white>HPI MDM</color>]#6495ED


User1 ->App1 : Provide core details to be updated 
activate App1 

    note over App1,FhirApi2
    
        POST<Endpoint>/Practitioner/$update-core
        
    
    endnote 
    
   activate FhirApi2
   
       loop Validate[]  
           self->self   
           
      endloop
      
     request Request from FhirApi2 to HpiMdm3
     
     
return Return updated Practitioner record \nto Application 


deactivate FhirApi2



 return Display updated Provider\ndetails to user
 
 deactivate App1 
 
 participant "<color:white> Integrating\napplication </color>"as App4 #6495ED{ }
 actor "Integrating application user" as User5 at 0
 rectangle "<FHIR API>\nHPI" as FhirApi7 #6495ED {}
 database HpiMdm8<<Database>>[<color=white>HPI MDM</color>]#6495ED{}
@enduml
